Victaria Tyrell
Victaria and Jon Bulwer, by Paolo Puggioni

  • A Feast for Crows (appendix)

Victaria Tyrell is the daughter of Ser Victor Tyrell, and is a distant cousin of the main branch of House Tyrell. She is the widow of Lord Jon Bulwer. They have one daughter, Alysanne,[2] and possibly a son.[3]
